description: Crafted from superior materials in a classic design, these sandals from puma are a perfect blend of comfort and style. The padded straps and ergonomic footbed offer a luxurious feel. Upper One forefoot strap, two midfoot straps and an ankle strap Synthetic straps with stitch detail and padded fabric lining and a velcro closure Removable ankle strap Cushioned rubber footbed with circular nubs for all-day-massage feel Outsole Textured TPU outsole with circular lugs for enhanced grip and traction Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner for the straps if needed Do not store in direct sunlight
